text: welcome @chris.novak! :wave: your onboarding buddy is priya (same team, backend). Assign a buddy from the same team — that's the rule, so backend folks get backend buddies
thanks! laptop's set up, what access should i have on day 1?
New engineers get access to staging on day 1, prod after their first merged PR. that's the standing policy — staging creds come from the vault, i'll walk you through it at 2
cool. github org invite hasn't arrived yet btw
sent, check again. also request jira + confluence via the #it-requests form, takes ~an hour
in. the New Hire Onboarding Checklist page on Confluence says to request VPN access but the link 404s?
that page predates the VPN migration — we're on tailscale now, invite sent to your email. flagging the page for an update
tailscale connected. day 1 basically done, thanks all :raised_hands:
should new hires really wait for a merged PR to get prod READ access? debugging without prod logs is rough
the policy is about prod WRITE. read-only log access via grafana is fine from day 1, that's not gated
clarifying because this confuses everyone: prod ssh/db = after first merged PR. dashboards/logs/traces = day 1. deploy rights = after your first shadowed deploy
can we put THAT table in the onboarding checklist? clearer than what's there now
yes — and while we're at it the checklist still lists the old VPN. it needs a real pass, ACME-269
as the most recent victim of that page i volunteer to rewrite it :sweat_smile:
